name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.10: lease-unit inventory + claim endpoint for the Zapier lease flow. New lease_units table (seeded from 40 physical units), POST /api/v1/leases/claim atomically claims the next available unit(s) per type (Einfaldur/Tvöfaldur/55") and returns serial + Nayax blocks for the contract; GET /api/v1/leases/units for the dashboard. Builds on v5.09.
